charter: Fix Codex ghost detection false positive: watchdog marks stdout_attach_failed while subprocess is alive and producing output. State does not clear failed_start metadata when output arrives late.
acceptance_contract: Watchdog does not mark a Codex turn as ghost/stdout_attach_failed when output arrives within startup timeout
failed_start_at and failed_start_reason metadata are cleared when late output is detected
Regression test reproducing diapr.ai run_0b00ed1aa694dda8 shape passes
